mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_article (id, title, slug, content_md, content_html, excerpt, author, publish_date, cover_image, category_id, status, is_featured) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{slug}, #{contentMd}, #{contentHtml}, #{excerpt}, #{author}, #{publishDate}, #{coverImage}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{isFeatured})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_article SET title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, content_md = #{contentMd}, content_html = #{contentHtml}, excerpt = #{excerpt}, author = #{author}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, category_id = #{categoryId}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_article SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_article SET is_featured = #{featured} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, c.slug as cat_slug, t.id as tag_id, t.name as tag_name, t.slug as tag_slug FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id LEFT JOIN t_tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.slug = #{slug} AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT a.*, c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, c.slug as cat_slug, t.id as tag_id, t.name as tag_name, t.slug as tag_slug FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id LEFT JOIN t_tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, c.slug as cat_slug, t.id as tag_id, t.name as tag_name, t.slug as tag_slug FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id LEFT JOIN t_tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM t_article a
a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND a.id IN (SELECT article_id FROM t_article_tag WHERE tag_id = #{tagId})
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.excerpt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT DISTINCT a.*, c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, c.slug as cat_slug FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.is_featured = 1 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT a.*, c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, c.slug as cat_slug FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_category c ON a.category_id = c.id
a.status != 'DELETED'
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.excerpt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM t_article a
a.status != 'DELETED'
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.excerpt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_article SET prerequisite_id = #{prerequisiteId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_article SET prerequisite_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_article SET next_article_id = #{nextArticleId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_article SET next_article_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
